claims.summary: The semantic lane uses one deterministic fixed-seed projection basis held in a OnceLock.
claims.disposition: verify the fixed legacy fill, one-time initialization, and unchanged semantic/narrative lane ownership

claims.summary: Column normalization must remain finite and avoid dead projected dimensions.
claims.disposition: verify projection_basis_health_v1 and its finite, near-unit, non-dead regressions

claims.summary: Production f32 accumulation can drift from a higher-precision reference and should remain observable.
claims.disposition: verify ProjectionPrecisionAuditV1 and the deterministic f32-versus-f64 probe without changing live weights

claims.summary: The entropy gate needs a genuinely smooth onset to avoid a vibrancy pop around 0.85.
claims.disposition: verify the actual application path and gate, derivative, monotonicity, and just-above-gate tests
